channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: North Korea unveils new plant for nuclear weapons fuel production
item.description: State media photos suggest the facility is designed to produce weapons-grade uranium.

item.title: What is needed for a vaccine against the current Ebola strain?
item.description: An effective vaccine exists but not for the strain spreading in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Several trials are underway.

item.title: New York City overhauls transit system for World Cup and NBA finals crowds
item.description: Transit officials prepare for up to 100,000 additional daily travelers during major sporting events.

item.title: Gun control group files lawsuit against ATF over records release
item.description: Brady, a nonprofit gun control advocacy group, is suing the ATF and DOJ for refusing to release documents and information about who t...
